basic_details.job_title: DRDO CVRDE Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 16 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Combat Vehicles Research & Development Establishment (CVRDE), DRDO, Ministry of Defence, Government of India
basic_details.short_information: The Combat Vehicles Research & Development Establishment (CVRDE) has officially announced the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 with 16 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official website of CVRDE, DRDO. Candidates who meet the age criteria up to 28 years and hold qualifications such as B.E./B.Tech with First Division and valid GATE score or M.E./M.Tech with First Division at both Graduate and Post Graduate levels are eligible to apply for these posts. The application process will remain open in offline mode until 15 July 2026. Direct links to download the not

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age Relaxation: OBC (Non creamy layer): Not exceeding 31 years; SC/ST: Not exceeding 33 years.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B.Tech with First Division from a recognized university with valid GATE score, M.E/M.Tech with First Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level
qualification.details: Mechanical Engineering: B.E. / B.Tech with First Division from a recognized university with valid GATE score (OR) M.E/M.Tech with First Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level. Electrical and Electronics Engineering: B.E. / B.Tech with First Division from a recognized university with valid GATE score (OR) M.E/M.Tech with First Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level. Electronics and Communication Engineering: B.E. / B.Tech with First Division from a recognized university with valid GATE score (OR) M.E/M.Tech with First Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level. Computer Science Engineering: B.E. / B.Tech with First Division from a recognized university with valid GATE score (OR) M.E/M.Tech with First Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO CVRDE Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://drdo.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download DRDO CVRDE Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO CVRDE JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts at DRDO CVRDE is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 16 vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at DRDO CVRDE.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.E./B.Tech with First Division and a valid GATE score, or an M.E/M.Tech with First Division at both graduate and postgraduate levels.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts is 28 years, with age relaxations applicable for OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the DRDO CVRDE JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection criteria for the JRF posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test (objective type) followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the DRDO CVRDE located?
faq.answer: DRDO CVRDE is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600054.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions are contractual in nature.
